authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams (Mouth) layer record for gaz_id 1164088, "Dismal Creek", Stream, Lake Co. OR / Modoc Co. CA (border-crossing)
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":1164088,"gaz_name":"Dismal Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"OR","county_name":"Modoc"/"Lake","objectid_1":1411487,"isunknowncoords":2}, two-point multipoint (source near 42.06656°N, 120.15108°W in Lake Co. OR; mouth near 41.97628°N, 120.17135°W in Modoc Co. CA). Corrects prior file coordinates (-120.1600, 41.9700), which were ~1.2 km from the actual CA-side (Modoc Co.) mouth point and appear to have been a guessed estimate rather than a GNIS pull.

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(43) — Dismal Creek (Modoc Co.)
sources.quotedText: Dismal Creek (Modoc Co.). Sat. Preceding Memorial Day through the last day in Feb. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: CDFW — Designated Wild and Heritage Trout Waters
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
